title: Decoration
body:
Add decorations to Minecraft, include:
- Platform blocks
- Concrete slabs
- Concrete vertical slabs
- Catenary wires
- Traffic light

Note that concrete slabs are in Colored Blocks item group.

You can change the time of each color for traffic light with the game rules: `trafficLightRedTicks`, `trafficLightYellowTicks` and `trafficLightGreenTicks`.
